title: User Guides - Onboarding > Fit test for currently connected device
scenario: Fit test can be started for connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 via App Settings > User Guides > Onboarding section
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 device is connected to the app.
3. Tap the Menu icon (hamburger menu) or navigate to the Home screen.
4. Tap on Settings (gear icon) to open App Settings.
5. Scroll down and tap on User Guides.
6. In the User Guides section, locate and tap on Onboarding.
7. Verify that the Fit test option is available and can be started for the currently connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 device.
expected: The Fit test can be started successfully for the connected Poly Voyager Free 60/60+/20 device from the Onboarding section under User Guides in App Settings.
